title: CGC PMS AutoPilot Loop State
description: Minimal state contract for one AutoPilot loop turn.

loopId.description: Stable loop identifier without embedding run logs or transient paths.

issueId.description: Ready issue or planned task identifier.

phase.description: Current loop phase in the owner state machine.

actorRole.description: Role currently responsible for this phase.

inputArtifacts.description: Short artifact references used as input for this phase.

outputArtifacts.description: Short artifact references produced by this phase.

verification.description: Minimal verification evidence or commands tied to the current state.

failureCategory.description: Failure classification aligned with the existing classifier output.

decision.description: Loop decision after observing current evidence.

nextAction.description: Immediate next step in one short sentence.

stopReason.description: Reason for stop or pause; use 'none' when not stopping.
